summary: Tested Breed Products & PICKS Feature - All 5 features verified working correctly. Backend has 160 breed products across 20 breeds. Pillar-specific picks API returns celebrate-specific products. Frontend /celebrate page shows breed cakes when 'By Breed' filter clicked. Logged-in users see personalized picks in both the main page and Mira panel.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Breed Products & PICKS feature verified working. Key findings: 1) /api/breed-catalogue/admin/breed-products-stats returns 160 products across 20 breeds (8 products per breed). 2) /api/mira/top-picks/{pet}/pillar/celebrate returns pillar-specific picks including catalogue and concierge suggestions. 3) Frontend /celebrate page has 'Breed Cakes' tab that filters to show breed-specific cakes (42 total). 4) Logged-in users see personalized picks based on their pet's profile. 5) Mira panel opens and shows curated content for the selected pet.
